snippet.title: Marvel's Wolverine - Official Release Date Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
Don't miss the brief Release Date Reveal Trailer for Marvel's Wolverine, the next superhero action-adventure game developed by Insomniac Games. 

Players will embody Logan as the Wolverine in a bombastic story with brutal claw combat, violent rage, and relentless determination to come to terms with the man he used to be. Marvel's Wolverine is launching on September 15 for PlayStation 5 (PS5).

#IGN #MarvelsWolverine #Action

snippet.title: For All Mankind — Season 5 Official Trailer | Apple TV
snippet.description:
The fight for freedom lies beyond the stars. For All Mankind returns March 27 on Apple TV  https://apple.co/_ForAllMankind

Season five of “For All Mankind” picks up in the years since the Goldilocks asteroid heist. Happy Valley has grown into a thriving colony with thousands of residents and a base for new missions that will take us even further into the solar system. But with the nations of Earth now demanding law and order on the Red Planet, friction continues to build between the people who live on Mars and their former home. The ensemble cast returning for season five includes Joel Kinnaman, Toby Kebbell, Edi Gathegi, Cynthy Wu, Coral Peña and Wrenn Schmidt, alongside new series regulars Mireille Enos (“The Killing,” “Hanna”), Costa Ronin (“The Americans,” “Homeland”), Sean Kaufman (“The Summer I Turned Pretty”), Ruby Cruz (“Bottoms”) and Ines Asserson (“Royalteen”).

“For All Mankind” is created by Emmy Award winner Moore, and Emmy nominees Wolpert and Nedivi. Wolpert and Nedivi serve as showrunners and executive produce alongside Moore and Maril Davis of Tall Ship Productions, as well as Kira Snyder, David Weddle, Bradley Thompson and Seth Edelstein. “For All Mankind” is produced for Apple TV by Sony Pictures Television.

All four seasons of “For All Mankind” are now streaming on Apple TV.

localized.description:
The fight for freedom lies beyond the stars. For All Mankind returns March 27 on Apple TV  https://apple.co/_ForAllMankind

Season five of “For All Mankind” picks up in the years since the Goldilocks asteroid heist. Happy Valley has grown into a thriving colony with thousands of residents and a base for new missions that will take us even further into the solar system. But with the nations of Earth now demanding law and order on the Red Planet, friction continues to build between the people who live on Mars and their former home. The ensemble cast returning for season five includes Joel Kinnaman, Toby Kebbell, Edi Gathegi, Cynthy Wu, Coral Peña and Wrenn Schmidt, alongside new series regulars Mireille Enos (“The Killing,” “Hanna”), Costa Ronin (“The Americans,” “Homeland”), Sean Kaufman (“The Summer I Turned Pretty”), Ruby Cruz (“Bottoms”) and Ines Asserson (“Royalteen”).

“For All Mankind” is created by Emmy Award winner Moore, and Emmy nominees Wolpert and Nedivi. Wolpert and Nedivi serve as showrunners and executive produce alongside Moore and Maril Davis of Tall Ship Productions, as well as Kira Snyder, David Weddle, Bradley Thompson and Seth Edelstein. “For All Mankind” is produced for Apple TV by Sony Pictures Television.

All four seasons of “For All Mankind” are now streaming on Apple TV.

LYRICS

There’s a dark swarm growing from beyond the trees
It feeds on the spoils killing more than it eats
There is no suffering in silence hear song of the swamp
Its a jaw locked fight for your life to the top

CHOMP

Baptized in the mire of the lower lands
Set apart from the cower of the common man
Deep down in the shadows of the pale moon
There’s a bellow in the ever gloom

It calls me by name

Eyes roll back when the teeth bite down
The beast stays fed and the weak will drown
Deeper and deeper down to the bottom you go
Leave the bones for the bottom feeders and flesh for the crows

Hid in shadows, lurking in the dark
Scarred by jaws refusing to be starved
When the sun sinks
and the scales begin to rise
There’s a wake in the water
behind godless eyes

EAT

OVERPOWER

snippet.title: Apekz - Tuldok
snippet.description:
Produced by @thisisneroph 

Intro 

My life ain't so bad  
You drive so fast  
To the silence, baby  
Don't trip, relax
And we'll be alright  
’Til the sunrise

Inakyat ko mataas na bundok
Di tumigil kahit mga paa ko mabugbog
kung kelan nakatungtong sa tuktok
Saka naman nagkaroon ng tuldok x2


Verse

Maraming nagaabang maraming nagtatanong
Kelan battle miss ka na namin mang baon
Bago ko sagutin kung bakit ba ganon
Ibalik muna natin sa dating panahon

Estranghero at Ramon, Yawzi at Pajutes
Datu vs Loonie eto snappy na salute
Hanggang sa maligaw kay eminem pati kay juice
Binge watch ng grind time pagka galing ko ng school

Rekta na kagad sa computer shop
Panahong di pa uso yung google maps 
Sina soundtrip yung freestyle ni supernat
Ako’y nahuli ng rap parang na-booby trap

Hanggang sa mapanuod yung cameltoe versus datu
Brand new ginanap sa quantum
Acapella parang dumbfoundead vs tantrum
Tagalog pa kaya yung dating ay naging times two

Tiningnan ko kung facebook sila
Gusto ko na malaman kung meant to be ba
Di lang na simple na asaran parang beh bote nga
Inisip lang yung legacy may a to z pa

2010 kalaban ko si harlem ty
 B A T T L E R A P
Komedyante na rapper parang michael v.
Nagapi nung unang salang pero ays lang gee

Ako ay og parang obe wan kenobi
Unang tf ko nun kay daddy joe d.
Five hundred pesos yung inabot kay toti
Pasimple lowkey palihim parang shinobi

Unang laban ko disisyete anyos
Nung natalo winning streak na pagkatapos
Pano pa pag yung degree ay nairaos
Rap ang pinili pinagisipan ng maayos

Pagbaba ng barko walang ng doubt
Nilaban ko kagad si bryan lao
Imbis na mag tiktik kalawang mamili ng weak na kalaban
Ang gusto ko peak na agad bakbakan sa south

Nababad ng husto lalong pinahusay
Isang dos por dos tatlong isabuhay
Naihanay ako sa mga tunay
Yung bata na nag solo flight dun sa malugay

Dumaan ang pandemya handa pa rin gumera
Kaso ba’t may hurado na nagpapalitan ng pera
Nag iba yung sistema walang tinatalo
Di na ata to yung liga na kilala ko

Fast forward twenty twenty two
Laban ko kay Sinio ready execute
Yung lugar sobrang grimey pwede mv shoot
Binuhos ko walang natira miski na residue

Dahil sa pustahan yung career ang tinaya ko
Ayoko lang yung sining natin parang ginagago
Galit yung ibang tao  
Pero may resibo, meron video garapalan na hindi na tinatago

“Yari ka pati yung presidente binangga mo”
Alam kong pwedeng kahinatnan ng ginawa ko
Buti kahit papano meron pinagbago
At di totoo na matagal ko na yun pinaplano

“Kung meron kang problema dapat kinausap mo”
Malapit na yung battle nung nadagdag yun sa sulat ko
Ipapaalam ko pa ba yun kay Anygma
Battle emcee din sya ulo pa ng liga

Yung pagkatalo raw kay gorio ay dinadamdam
di nakuha kampeonato na inaasam
liga ay sinasaktan tanginang pustahan yan
dahil sa utang na loob hinahayaan lang 

Yung pusta isang milyon alam kong talo na’ko
Dagdag mo pa gawain nung mga hurado
Tensionado, emosyon, pressure halo-halo
Kaya sa entablado nagmukha akong barumbado

Lumipas ang tatlong taon
Siguro nawala yung mga tampo ngayon
Fliptop anniversary nag ayang pumunta don
Para magpakumbaba at masabi ko yung rason

Walang driver si loons kaya di nakasabay
Sumama ako kay zaki sa grab ay sumakay
Kahit di imbitado pumunta pasaway
Para personal mag sorry at makipagkamay

Bumili ng sariling alak at ng mangunguya
Para di masabi na ang kapal naman ng mukha
Nandun din lahat ng pasimple na nangungutya
Pero balewala gold label yung tinutungga

Hinintay ko siya baka lang natraffic
Pati si loons wala pa ba yan naman awit
Tinawag ng bantay si anygma daw nagalit
At ang sabi sakin pinapaalis ka ni aric

Ang sabi ko ganon ba di nako nagtanong pa
Sana lang hinarap nya ko gusto ko mangamusta
Kahit di na bigyan ng laban ay wala kong pake
Basta matapos yung gabi na maayos kami

Kaso eto na yung ending ni tanga 
Pero ang bait ni kuya dennis talaga
Ba’t kapa pumunta eh ekis ka na nga
Diyos nga nagpapatawad ay atheist ka pala

Tinanggap ko kahit na masakit
At least malinaw na di na ako makakabalik
Namiss ko yung yanig, pagod at stress
Lam kong maraming sabik kay battousaipekz

But i guess this is the end
Di na kailangan icallout sa big event
Hinihiling kasi pag bumanat hindi bitin
Pag FT alam mong hindi titipirin kalaban titirisin

Shoutout sa mga bago hindi pabulong
Mindanao, visayas pati sa luzon
Dire diretso lang wag magningas kugon
“Nauubos na yung magaling” mali ako don

Sa mga tagahanga na nanunuod sa akin
Hinugot nyo ako sa kumunoy na malalim
di ko man matupad na mga bulong sa hangin
Gusto kong malaman nyo kayo bumuo sa akin

Sa buhay natin kailangan ng sakripisyo
Upang marating ang sariling paraiso
Meron dahilan kung bakit natatalisod
May plano ang Diyos kung bakit ka nandirito

Pasensya na kahit hilutin ko kapos
Eto na yung huling minuto ko tapos
Salamat aric ang buti mo na boss
Salamat fliptop mi ultimo adios

Outro

My life ain't so bad  
You drive so fast  
To the silence, baby  
Don't trip, relax
And we'll be alright  
’Til the sunrise

#tuldok #apekz #apekztuldok

Shoutout sa mga bago hindi pabulong
Mindanao, visayas pati sa luzon
Dire diretso lang wag magningas kugon
“Nauubos na yung magaling” mali ako don

Sa mga tagahanga na nanunuod sa akin
Hinugot nyo ako sa kumunoy na malalim
di ko man matupad na mga bulong sa hangin
Gusto kong malaman nyo kayo bumuo sa akin

Sa buhay natin kailangan ng sakripisyo
Upang marating ang sariling paraiso
Meron dahilan kung bakit natatalisod
May plano ang Diyos kung bakit ka nandirito

Pasensya na kahit hilutin ko kapos
Eto na yung huling minuto ko tapos
Salamat aric ang buti mo na boss
Salamat fliptop mi ultimo adios

Outro

My life ain't so bad  
You drive so fast  
To the silence, baby  
Don't trip, relax
And we'll be alright  
’Til the sunrise

#tuldok #apekz #apekztuldok

snippet.title: THE SUPER MARIO GALAXY MOVIE "Bowser Jr. Activates Megaleg" Trailer (NEW 2026)
snippet.description:
Official Website: https://www.thesupermariogalaxymovie.com

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is only in theaters April 1.

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is an animated film based on the world of Super Mario Bros., and follows The Super Mario Bros. Movie, which was released in 2023 and earned more than $1.3 billion worldwide. Both the 2023 film and The Super Mario Galaxy Movie are produced by Chris Meledandri of Illumination and Shigeru Miyamoto of Nintendo.
 
The film will be co-financed by Universal Pictures and Nintendo and will be released worldwide by Universal Pictures.

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is directed by returning filmmakers Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic, from a screenplay by returning screenwriter Matthew Fogel, with Brian Tyler returning to compose the score.

SUBSCRIBE for more ANIMATED videos here: www.youtube.com/@JoBloAnimatedVideos?sub_confirmation=1

snippet.description:

Lyric Video by Johnny Chew

Lyrics: 
Human nature is strange
I know you're bad for me
And I never feel rage,
At least not so easily
Has addiction come for me

I don't smoke cigarettes, 
Don't do things I'll regret,
Don't mood swing shoulder bets, 
But baby with you, that's just how I get

I have every bit of you,
Every awful corner 
Biting more than I can chew,
Just so I'll feel warmer
What a greedy, hungry horror am I

I don't smoke cigarettes, 
Don't do things I'll regret, 
Don't mood swing shoulder bets,
 
Don't cut strings to attach to
Just some far-sought silhouette, 
A journey that I'll one day dread
I'm caught up in a web, 
I'm blinded by you, that's just how I get
That's just how I get 

(The pendulum swings back around)
(I need more tempo, crave more sound)

Don't do things I'll regret,

snippet.title: Ishqa'n De Lekhe (Official Trailer) | Gurnam Bhullar | Isha Malviya | New Punjabi Movie 2026
snippet.description:
Get ready to fall in love all over again! Speed Records presents the trailer for the most-awaited Punjabi love story of 2026- "Ishqa'n De Lekhe".

Starring the sensational Gurnam Bhullar alongside the stunning Isha Malviya, this Punjabi cinema is crafted for every soul that has ever loved deeply. Directed by the talented Manvir Brar, Ishqa'n De Lekhe is set to redefine Punjabi romance on the big screen.
After delivering back-to-back blockbusters with Lekh and Surkhi Bhindi, Gurnam Bhullar returns with yet another masterpiece — and this one is nothing short of magical.
